steps.title: Find the shared feature
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between Lady in Brown and Mobile: Pittsburgh. The notes show that both are artworks that won Carnegie Prize gold medals.

steps.title: Avoid one-sided details
steps.content: Choice B mentions only Lavery and one artwork. Choice C discusses the museum awarding medals to painters and sculptors, not the two artworks' shared trait. Choice D emphasizes a difference in medium. The remaining choice states the similarity. The answer is A.
